program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define contract-level lifecycle gates for plan authoring, AI implementation handoff, Hermes validation, Claude review, human approval, blocked-claim handling, and subphase closeout.
claude_questions: Do the lifecycle gate groups lock entry, review, approval, blocked, and closeout states for plan authoring, AI implementation handoff, Hermes validation, Claude review, human approval, blocked-claim handling, and subphase closeout?
Does the lifecycle definition preserve Hermes as evidence-only, Claude as read-only review, and HumanApproval as non-delegable?
Do blocked-claim policies keep P0/P1 from reaching production_ready and require P2/P3 disposition?
Does the contract avoid claiming a runtime workflow engine, deploy automation, production data mutation, or human approval?
Is anything missing before RP00.P00.M03.S01 can be promoted from implemented to production_ready?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
